test.name: UAT-ReportFail-010 Admin change report status from In process to Inspecting

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin123' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text '123456789' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Mouse Over
kw.doc: Simulates hovering the mouse over the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=(//button[normalize-space()="กำลังตรวจสอบ"])'.

...

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"อัปเดตสถานะสำเร็จ")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"สถานะรายงานเปลี่ยนเป็น กำลังตรวจสอบ")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.arg: สถานะการรายงานของคุณถูกเปลี่ยนจาก "รอดำเนินการ" เป็น "กำลังตรวจสอบ"
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.arg: xpath=//a[normalize-space()="ประวัติการรายงาน"]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.arg: xpath=//h2[normalize-space()="รับเรื่องแล้ว"]/ancestor::div[contains(@class,"cursor-pointer")]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.arg: รับเรื่องแล้ว
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.status:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1254, 287). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: MicrosoftEdge=145.0.3800.82); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: Symbols not available. test.name: UAT-ReportFail-011 Admin change report status from Inspecting to Respond to reports

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin123' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกชื่อผู้ใช้หรืออีเมล"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: Typing text '123456789' into text field '//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]'.
kw.arg: //input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่าน"]
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Simulates hovering the mouse over the element ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=(//button[normalize-space()="ตอบรับการรายงาน"])'.
Element with locator 'xpath=(//button[normalize-space()="ตอบรับการรายงาน"])' not found.
kw.arg: xpath=(//button[normalize-space()="ตอบรับการรายงาน"])
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=(//button[normalize-space()="ตอบรับการรายงาน"])' not found.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"อัปเดตสถานะสำเร็จ")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//*[contains(text(),"สถานะรายงานเปลี่ยนเป็น ตอบรับการรายงานแล้ว")]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.arg: สถานะการรายงานของคุณถูกเปลี่ยนจาก "กำลังตรวจสอบ" เป็น "ดำเนินการเสร็จสิ้น"
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.arg: xpath=//a[normalize-space()="ประวัติการรายงาน"]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.arg: xpath=//h2[normalize-space()="ดำเนินการแล้ว"]/ancestor::div[contains(@class,"cursor-pointer")]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.arg: ดำเนินการแล้ว
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

test.status: Element with locator 'xpath=(//button[normalize-space()="ตอบรับการรายงาน"])' not found.

test.name: UAT-ReportFail-012 Admin change report status from In process to Reject

kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

kw.name: Open Browser
